channel.title: GitHub Crystal Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Crystal in GitHub

item.title: hkalexling/Mango
item.description: Mango is a self-hosted manga server and web reader

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal
item.description: 💎 A collection of awesome Crystal libraries, tools, frameworks and software

item.title: luckyframework/lucky
item.description: A full-featured Crystal web framework that catches bugs for you, runs incredibly fast, and helps you write code that lasts.

item.title: crystal-ameba/ameba
item.description: A static code analysis tool for Crystal

item.title: oprypin/nightly.link
item.description: Downloads the latest "nightly" build/artifact from a continuous testing workflow
